news.title:
CGSMFI 2.0 launched to provide ₹20,000 cr guarantees for MFI lending.
IIFL notes the ₹300 cr cap may impact larger MFIs like CreditAccess, L&T Finance.
news.summary:
CGSMFI 2.0 launched to provide ₹20,000 cr guarantees for MFI lending.
IIFL notes the ₹300 cr cap may impact larger MFIs like CreditAccess, L&T Finance.

news.title:
CreditAccess Grameen issues 4,000 secured USD bonds worth $40M, listed on NSE IFSC.
Bonds have 5-year maturity, semi-annual interest at 240 bps + Term SOFR, secured by loan receivables.
news.summary:
CreditAccess Grameen issues 4,000 secured USD bonds worth $40M, listed on NSE IFSC.
Bonds have 5-year maturity, semi-annual interest at 240 bps + Term SOFR, secured by loan receivables.

news.title:
CreditAccess Grameen secured $75M syndicated social loan via ECB led by HSBC.
Over $300M foreign funding commitments secured for FY 2025-26 social projects.
news.summary:
CreditAccess Grameen secured $75M syndicated social loan via ECB led by HSBC.
Over $300M foreign funding commitments secured for FY 2025-26 social projects.

news.title:
Axis Bank denied plans to bid for a stake in CreditAccess Grameen, dismissing speculation.
CLSA noted potential synergies in such a deal, highlighting benefits like high margins and recovery in microfinance.
news.summary:
Axis Bank denied plans to bid for a stake in CreditAccess Grameen, dismissing speculation.
CLSA noted potential synergies in such a deal, highlighting benefits like high margins and recovery in microfinance.

news.title:
CLSA suggests Axis Bank acquiring CreditAccess Grameen, valuing the deal at $2.3B, as a 'win-win' for both.
Axis Bank may gain high-margin business and funding synergies, as CreditAccess Grameen's promoter stake sale process progresses.
news.summary:
CLSA suggests Axis Bank acquiring CreditAccess Grameen, valuing the deal at $2.3B, as a 'win-win' for both.
Axis Bank may gain high-margin business and funding synergies, as CreditAccess Grameen's promoter stake sale process progresses.

news.title:
CreditAccess Grameen Ltd schedules an investor meet on Feb 11, 2026.
The one-on-one virtual meeting with Ishana Capital is from 12:00 PM to 1:00 PM.
news.summary:
CreditAccess Grameen Ltd schedules an investor meet on Feb 11, 2026.
The one-on-one virtual meeting with Ishana Capital is from 12:00 PM to 1:00 PM.

news.title:
CreditAccess Grameen Ltd schedules an investor meeting on Jan 28, 2026, 3-4 PM IST.
The virtual one-to-one meeting with Ashmore Investment is confirmed.
news.summary:
CreditAccess Grameen Ltd schedules an investor meeting on Jan 28, 2026, 3-4 PM IST.
The virtual one-to-one meeting with Ashmore Investment is confirmed.

news.title:
Axis Bank may bid for the promoter stake in CreditAccess Grameen.
CreditAccess Grameen has appointed bankers to manage the promoter stake sale.
news.summary:
Axis Bank may bid for the promoter stake in CreditAccess Grameen.
CreditAccess Grameen has appointed bankers to manage the promoter stake sale.

news.title:
Markets ended lower; Sensex fell 271 pts to 81,910, Nifty slipped 75 pts to 25,158. India VIX surged 8%, reflecting sharp volatility.
Midcap index dropped 662 pts; biggest losers included ICICI Bank, Trent, Bharat Electronics, while CreditAccess Grameen rose 10%.
news.summary:
Markets ended lower; Sensex fell 271 pts to 81,910, Nifty slipped 75 pts to 25,158. India VIX surged 8%, reflecting sharp volatility.
Midcap index dropped 662 pts; biggest losers included ICICI Bank, Trent, Bharat Electronics, while CreditAccess Grameen rose 10%.

news.title: CreditAccess Grameen surged 10% following a brokerage upgrade on asset quality outlook.
news.summary: CreditAccess Grameen surged 10% following a brokerage upgrade on asset quality outlook.

news.title:
CreditAccess Grameen targets 4% ROA, 16-17% ROE, with potential for 4.5% ROA and 20% ROE in strong years.
Retail finance portfolio to exceed 15% of AUM and foreign borrowings to reach 25-30% by FY'28.
news.summary:
CreditAccess Grameen targets 4% ROA, 16-17% ROE, with potential for 4.5% ROA and 20% ROE in strong years.
Retail finance portfolio to exceed 15% of AUM and foreign borrowings to reach 25-30% by FY'28.

news.title:
CreditAccess Grameen released the audio recording of its Q3 FY26 results call.
The recording is accessible on their website under investor presentations.
news.summary:
CreditAccess Grameen released the audio recording of its Q3 FY26 results call.
The recording is accessible on their website under investor presentations.

news.title:
CreditAccess Grameen's Q3 Gross Stage 3 loans rose to 4.04% from 3.65% QoQ.
Net Stage 3 loans also increased to 1.36% from 1.26% QoQ.
news.summary:
CreditAccess Grameen's Q3 Gross Stage 3 loans rose to 4.04% from 3.65% QoQ.
Net Stage 3 loans also increased to 1.36% from 1.26% QoQ.

news.title:
CreditAccess Grameen Ltd reported Q3 FY26 GLP at INR 26,566 Cr, up 7.1% YoY, with PAT of INR 252 Cr, a 153.3% YoY increase.
NIM improved to 13.9% with robust disbursements of INR 5,767 Cr, growth driven by asset quality normalization and higher borrower additions.
news.summary:
CreditAccess Grameen Ltd reported Q3 FY26 GLP at INR 26,566 Cr, up 7.1% YoY, with PAT of INR 252 Cr, a 153.3% YoY increase.
NIM improved to 13.9% with robust disbursements of INR 5,767 Cr, growth driven by asset quality normalization and higher borrower additions.

news.title:
CreditAccess Grameen approved Q3 and nine-month unaudited results, granting 9.1L stock options under the 2011 ESOP plan.
EPS for nine months ended Dec 31, 2025: Basic 27.4, Diluted 27.3; Net profit after tax: ₹438.1 crore.
news.summary:
CreditAccess Grameen approved Q3 and nine-month unaudited results, granting 9.1L stock options under the 2011 ESOP plan.
EPS for nine months ended Dec 31, 2025: Basic 27.4, Diluted 27.3; Net profit after tax: ₹438.1 crore.

news.title:
CreditAccess Grameen Ltd schedules Q3 FY26 results call on Jan 20, 2026, at 6:30 PM IST.
Call to feature key management, organized by HDFC Securities; dial-in details provided.
news.summary:
CreditAccess Grameen Ltd schedules Q3 FY26 results call on Jan 20, 2026, at 6:30 PM IST.
Call to feature key management, organized by HDFC Securities; dial-in details provided.

news.title:
Creditaccess Grameen highlights Karnataka as a top-performing state.
The state shows significant improvements in asset quality trends.
news.summary:
Creditaccess Grameen highlights Karnataka as a top-performing state.
The state shows significant improvements in asset quality trends.

news.title:
CreditAccess Grameen opened 165 branches in 9M FY26, 15 in Q3 FY26.
6.5 lakh new borrowers added in 9M FY26, 2.1 lakh in Q3 FY26.
news.summary:
CreditAccess Grameen opened 165 branches in 9M FY26, 15 in Q3 FY26.
6.5 lakh new borrowers added in 9M FY26, 2.1 lakh in Q3 FY26.

news.title:
CreditAccess Grameen's asset quality normalized with X Bucket CE at 99.7% in Dec 2025.
Disbursements rose 26% MoM; 165 branches, 6.5 lakh borrowers added in FY26.
news.summary:
CreditAccess Grameen's asset quality normalized with X Bucket CE at 99.7% in Dec 2025.
Disbursements rose 26% MoM; 165 branches, 6.5 lakh borrowers added in FY26.

news.title:
HDFC AMC and CreditAccess Grameen lead NBFC rally in Q3 FY26, per DRChoksey.
Bajaj Finance, Poonawalla Fincorp, and Jio Financial show robust AUM growth.
news.summary:
HDFC AMC and CreditAccess Grameen lead NBFC rally in Q3 FY26, per DRChoksey.
Bajaj Finance, Poonawalla Fincorp, and Jio Financial show robust AUM growth.
